# Tecorbitron Solutions Private Limited

> Tecorbitron is a registered IT company based in Ghaziabad, NCR, India. We design, develop, and scale websites, mobile apps, and custom software solutions for startups, SMBs, and businesses worldwide. Founded in August 2024 by Sagar Chauhan.

## About

- Tecorbitron Solutions Pvt. Ltd. is incorporated under MCA (CIN: U62011UP2024PTC207353)
- GST registered and MSME certified company
- headquartered in Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India
- Serves clients across India, UAE, UK, USA, and beyond
- Tagline: We Build Bold

## Founder

- Sagar Chauhan — Founder & CEO
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nssagarrajput

## Services

- [Web Development](https://www.tecorbitron.com/services) — High-performance websites and web applications built with Next.js and React
- [App Development](https://www.tecorbitron.com/services) — Cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android using React Native
- [E-commerce Development](https://www.tecorbitron.com/services) — Custom storefronts, Shopify, WooCommerce integrations
- [Custom Software](https://www.tecorbitron.com/services) — ERP systems, CRMs, dashboards, and workflow automation tools
- [SEO & Digital Growth](https://www.tecorbitron.com/services) — Technical SEO, local SEO, Google Ads, performance tracking
- [Cloud & AI Integration](https://www.tecorbitron.com/services) — AI chatbots, smart search, cloud deployment on AWS, GCP, Azure

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Angular, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, Express, Laravel, Spring Boot, Python
- Mobile: React Native, Flutter, Swift
- Database: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis
- Cloud: AWS, Google Cloud, Azure, DigitalOcean
- DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes
- Design: Figma

## Industries Served

Agriculture, Automotive, Beauty & Wellness, Retail & E-commerce, Education, Enterprise & B2B, Fashion, Fintech, Restaurants, Healthcare, Hospitality, Legal & Compliance, Manufacturing, SaaS & Productivity, Real Estate, Startups, Logistics, Travel & Tourism
